shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'git status --short && rg -n "useCombobox|blur|relatedTarget" src test tests 2>/dev/null | head -200'
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "useCombobox blur relatedTarget tab switch highlighted item" --limit 5'
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"relatedTarget\" src/hooks src/__tests__ | head -100 && cat package.json | sed -n '1,140p'"
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git diff -- src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getInputProps.test.js && git status --short'
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "Downshift useCombobox InputBlur relatedTarget highlighted selection" --limit 5'

/bin/bash -lc "nmem --json m add \"In Downshift's useCombobox hook, input blur must use the blur event's relatedTarget to distinguish deliberate focus movement from focus leaving the document. Dispatch InputBlur with selectItem: event.relatedTarget "'!== null (or equivalent truthiness check): a non-null relatedTarget preserves existing auto-selection of the highlighted item, while null closes the menu and clears the highlight without changing selectedItem/inputValue. Regression coverage belongs in src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getInputProps.test.js." -t "useCombobox blur selection semantics" --unit-type decision -l downshift -l useCombobox -s codex -i 0.8'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
`--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
